plugins.name: skillfetch
plugins.description: Manage synced AI skill instructions from external GitHub repos — security-scanned, diff-previewed, with local annotations that survive updates.

plugins.name: claude-token-guard
plugins.description: Cut token burn on every session — blocks expensive Explore/Plan agents and rewrites verbose Bash commands before they run.

plugins.name: claude-notifier
plugins.description: Desktop notifications for Claude Code — fires when Claude finishes or needs input (macOS + Linux).
